characters.appearance: Young male of Asian descent, late teens to early twenties. He has a slim build and a fair complexion. His hair is dark, thick, and styled in a messy, textured way.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: English बोलने में hesitation होती है? Check this out: [Do you hesitate while speaking English? Check this out:]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a highly relatable problem for the target audience (hesitation in speaking English).
- Immediately pivots to offering a solution.
- Establishes a casual, older-sibling tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: English बोलने में hesitation होती है? Check this out:

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: इस app में आप AI ट्यूटर के साथ रोज़ English बोलने की practice कर सकते हो, बिना किसी डर के। [In this app, you can practice speaking English daily with an AI tutor, without any fear.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the core product feature (AI tutor practice).
- Addresses the emotional barrier of fear or judgment when speaking.
- Shows the app interface actively listening to the user.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Practice English daily with an AI tutor. Listening...

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: And just like that, you get instant feedback to improve your grammar and pronunciation. [And just like that, you get instant feedback to improve your grammar and pronunciation.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights the immediate payoff of using the app (instant feedback).
- Focuses on practical improvement areas like grammar and pronunciation.
- Maintains the quick, satisfying pacing of the original ad.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: and just like that, instant feedback to improve your English

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: आज ही Supernova download करो और confidence के साथ बोलना शुरू करो। [Download Supernova today and start speaking with confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a clear, encouraging call to action.
- Replaces the competitor brand with Supernova.
- Removes the 'free' claim to align with Supernova's premium model while emphasizing the ultimate goal: confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Download Supernova today and speak with confidence
